title: RPG: Better Elderguardian Lite
description:
a lite version of the rpg:better elder guardian mod with only the basic features
 

a full version of this mod is called Rpg: Better Elder Guardian.It adds a lot of more content so be sure to check that one out aswell
body:
A lite version of the better elderguardian mod with only the basic features like the buffs and the summoning attack.


a full version of this mod is called Rpg: Better Elder Guardian.It adds a lot of more content so be sure to check that one out aswel
